title: pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. anosciadia
intro: Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. anosciadia, also known as the Anosciadia Hawkweed, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. anosciadia include reducing swelling and pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. This plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in some cases of eczema and dermatitis.
